description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has conditionally authorized selpercatinib for the treatment of adult patients with advanced RET fusion-positive non-small cell lung cancer not previously treated with a RET inhibitor.

indication.indication: Retsevmo as monotherapy is indicated for the treatment of adults with advanced RET fusion-positive non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) not previously treated with a RET inhibitor.
